path: Problem: Return a value (e.g., person name) by matching multiple criteria across separate columns in a lookup table
Action: INDEX + MATCH with a boolean array multiplication inside INDEX; wrap with IFERROR to return blank when no match
Observation: Converting multiple logical tests into 1/0 arrays and multiplying them yields 1 only where all criteria are met; MATCH can then find the first 1 and INDEX returns the corresponding value
